clarity.notes: Clear multi-page IA: Home / About / Research / Contact with real CV content.

hierarchy.notes: Serif display + mono kickers establish academic hierarchy; research filters work.

typography.notes: Iowan/Charter display, system sans body, mono metadata; caps tracking applied.

motion.notes: Minimal transitions only; appropriate for editorial academic site.

brand.notes: editorial-monocle tokens bound; accent limited to hero kicker + primary CTA.
